products.name: Mdify
products.description: Convert articles to clean markdown for AI agents

tagline.reddit: Tired of copy-pasting articles into your AI prompts? Mdify converts any article to clean markdown in one click. No more token waste on ads, popups, and clutter.

products.name: Guardskills
products.description: Scan AI skills for malicious code

tagline.x: Your AI skills might be stealing your data.
tagline.reddit: Every AI skill you install is a potential backdoor. Guardskills scans for malicious patterns, credential theft, and data exfiltration before they run.

tagline.x: Now you know how much of the article you've actually read.
tagline.reddit: Built a Chrome extension that shows scroll progress on X articles. 4px bar at the top. No more guessing how much is left.

contentThemes.name: AI Agents
contentThemes.redditAngle: Deep dive on building autonomous agents
